---
title: "Members"
date: last-modified
toc: false
---

## Principal Investigator 

### Kaoru Kakinuma

**Research interests**

- Climate-induced migration modeling
- Climate change and population aging
- Inequality under environmental change
- Socio-ecological resilience in Mongolian rangelands

---

### 柿沼 薫

**研究テーマ**

- 気候変動に伴う人口移動モデルの開発
- 気候変動と高齢化社会
- 環境変動が社会経済格差に与える影響
- モンゴル放牧草原における社会—生態レジリエンスの評価

---

## Students

- Information will be added as the group grows.
- 準備中
